findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh outcome evidence (Codeberg primary adoption movement), then rerun marketing independent verification.

findings.title: Live topology is clean and matches runtime state

findings.title: Docs verifier stable with 119+ consecutive passes

findings.title: Loop "marketing-pulse" (disabled) has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: When re-enabled, this loop would repeat flat tactics without self-improvement capability.

findings.recommended_fix: Before re-enabling, add self_improvement_mandate: detect flat outcomes, trigger redesign, register in self_improvement_loops.json.
